cell_type_key.guidance: obs column with cell type annotations.

iterations.guidance: Number of permutations for significance testing.

threshold.guidance: Minimum fraction of cells in a cell type expressing a gene for it to be considered active.

outputs.significant_means: Mean expression of significant ligand-receptor pairs
outputs.pvalues: P-values for each interaction per cell type pair
outputs.deconvoluted: Per-cell type contribution to each interaction
